body:
to be a playground to test the fluxes in a simple setting.

This PR also fixes a couple of bugs in the interfaces and adds an `adjust_freezing_ocean_temperature!` function, called on coupled model construction, that ensures that the initial ocean temperature is not below freezing, and sets the near-surface temperature to melting below sea ice
title: A low resolution coupled simulation

body:
This PR adds a new property called `StateExchanger`. The idea is that this type will hold objects needed to exchange information from components to ComponentInterfaces, and back.

The first application of this is to precompute and store the "interpolation indices" for spatial interpolation. This needs be performed only once and then re-used in `interpolate_atmospheric_state`.

This PR also adds a forcing to velocity components in `ocean_simulation` called BarotropicPotential forcing. This includes the atmospheric sea level pressure effect on ocean momentum (eg meteotsunamis etc)

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: Precompute interpolation indices + BarotropicPotentialForcing
